findings.evidence: Existing API is universe-polymorphic across source and target: `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule.lean:60` has `variable {M : Type w} {N : Type x}`, and `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule.lean:104` defines `structure Hom ... (M : Type w) (N : Type x)`, while this PR uses `Product.lean:46 variable {M N : Type w}`.
findings.fix: Introduce a separate universe for `N` in the unbundled section, e.g. `universe u v w x` and `variable {M : Type w} {N : Type x}`, leaving only the bundled `ComoduleCat.{u,v,w}` wrapper restricted to same-universe objects if needed.
findings.issue: `prodCoact`, `Comodule.Prod`, and the unbundled `prodFst`/`prodSnd`/`prodInl`/`prodInr` force `{M N : Type w}`, although the construction works for `M : Type w` and `N : Type x`.

summary: The unbundled product comodule API is unnecessarily restricted to two comodules in the same universe. This is below the natural level already used by the surrounding comodule morphism API.
